mapper.select:
SELECT u.id AS userId, u.avatar, u.nickname, f1.create_time AS followTime,
CASE WHEN f2.user_id IS NOT NULL AND f2.is_cancel = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS isMutualFollow FROM t_user_follow f1 INNER JOIN t_user u ON f1.followed_user_id = u.id
LEFT JOIN t_user_follow f2 ON f1.followed_user_id = f2.user_id AND f2.followed_user_id = #{userId} AND f2.is_cancel = 0 WHERE f1.user_id = #{userId} AND f1.is_cancel = 0 AND u.status = 1 ORDER BY f1.create_time DESC

SELECT u.id AS userId, u.avatar, u.nickname, f1.create_time AS followTime,
CASE WHEN f2.user_id IS NOT NULL AND f2.is_cancel = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS isMutualFollow FROM t_user_follow f1 INNER JOIN t_user u ON f1.user_id = u.id
LEFT JOIN t_user_follow f2 ON f1.user_id = f2.followed_user_id AND f2.user_id = #{userId} AND f2.is_cancel = 0 WHERE f1.followed_user_id = #{userId} AND f1.is_cancel = 0 AND u.status = 1 ORDER BY f1.create_time DESC
